_comment: Humanizer plugin configuration. Edit this file to tune behavior.

_docs.channels: List of channel IDs where humanizer applies. Common values: 'telegram', 'slack'. Empty = all channels.
_docs.targetPeerIds: Optional allowlist of Telegram peer IDs (user IDs, group IDs, topic IDs). Empty = all peers in allowed channels. Format for topics: '-1001774997176:topic:1'.
_docs.minChars: Minimum character count to activate humanizer. Short messages are skipped. Default: 900.
_docs.minWords: Alternative trigger: activate if word count >= this value (even if minChars not met). Default: 140.
_docs.minSentences: Minimum sentence count. Very short responses (< 4 sentences) are skipped. Default: 4.
_docs.skipWhenCodeBlocks: Skip messages that contain ``` code blocks. Recommended: true.
_docs.skipWhenMostlyStructured: Skip messages where most lines are bullets/lists/tables/headers. Recommended: true.
_docs.structuredRatioThreshold: 0.0–1.0. If structured lines / total lines > this threshold → skip. Default: 0.45.
_docs.maxEditRatio: 0.0–1.0. If total edit distance / original length > this → block changes (too aggressive). Default: 0.35.
_docs.normalizeEmDash: Replace em dash (— –) with hyphen ( - ). Default: true.
_docs.removeStockPhrases: Remove AI cliché phrases: 'at the end of the day', 'it's worth noting', 'delve into', 'leverage', etc. Default: true.
_docs.reduceHedging: Remove redundant hedging: 'may potentially' → 'may', 'somewhat ' → '', etc. Default: true.
_docs.rewriteRuleOfThree: Rewrite 'A, B, and C' → 'A and B, plus C'. Default: true.
_docs.dryRun: If true, run all rules but do NOT apply changes (log only). Useful for testing. Default: false.
_docs.debug: If true, log skip reasons and rule hits to openclaw logger. Default: false.
